The '''Zchtek worlds''' of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] were home to the [[Jin]]. Subjugated by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], they were the site of a genocide perpetrated by that regime.<ref name="Atlas" />
